tables.description: This eligibility table provides inclusion and exclusion information. Inclusion criteria:  patients with OTCD (ornithine transcarbamylase deficiency), healthy controls without metabolic disease, age at 7-60 years , able to undergo neuroimaging safely, and full scale IQ > 70. Exclusion criteria: patients and controls with mental retardation (full scale IQ < 70), age <7 or > 60, presence of ferromagnetic device(s) that preclude safe imaging, and pregnant.
